stimulus:
Welcome to the experiment.

You will see 140 statements about various topics.

Please read the statements and respond with whether you think they are true (Z key) or false (M key) as quickly as possible!

Press any key to begin.
The next 20 statements will be about Fractions. Press any key to continue.

Press T if you are paying attention. Do not press z or m.
